info.name: Query facilities based on optional parameters such as location or ID.

params.name: facilityIds
params.description: List of comma separated ids. When searching by multiple IDs, the API will return as many matches as it can find given any other parameters. If there isn't a match, the API will omit the ID. As per the JSON:API specification, unrecognized IDs will not result in a returned error but rather simply not return a result for that ID. Clients may supply IDs up to the limit their HTTP client enforces for URI path lengths. (Usually 2048 characters.)

params.name: zip
params.description: Zip code to search for facilities. More detailed zip codes can be passed in, but only the first five digits are used to determine facilities to return.

params.name: state
params.description: State in which to search for facilities. Except in rare cases, this is two characters.

params.name: lat
params.description: Latitude of point to search for facilities, in WGS84 coordinate reference system. Lat + long returns all facilities matching other given parameters, sorted by distance from that location. Must be accompanied by a valid longitude.

params.name: long
params.description: Longitude of point to search for facilities, in WGS84 coordinate reference system. Lat + long returns all facilities matching other given parameters, sorted by distance from that location. Must be accompanied by a valid latitude.

params.name: radius
params.description: Optional radial distance from specified latitude and longitude to filter facilities search in WGS84 coordinate reference system. Must be accompanied by a valid latitude and longitude.

params.name: bbox[]
params.description: Four `bbox[]` parameters, long1, lat1, long2, lat2. (WGS84 coordinate reference system)  A query by bounding box returns all facilities within a geographic area bounded by the given positions. The ordering of the coordinate pairs may be in any order.

params.name: visn
params.description: VISN search of matching facilities.

params.name: type
params.description: Type of facility location

params.name: services[]
params.description: List of services a facility offers

params.name: mobile
params.description: Boolean flag to include or exclude mobile facilities

params.name: page
params.description: Page of results to return per paginated response.

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of results to return per paginated response.

items.docs:
Query facilities with a combination of optional search parameters.

- A query with no search parameters will return all facilities in the response. 

- A query by bounding box returns all facilities within a geographic area bounded by the given positions. The ordering of the coordinate pairs may be in any order. 

- A query by latitude and longitude returns all facilities matching other given parameters, sorted by distance from that location. If either `lat` or `long` are supplied, both must be

info.name: Retrieve a specific facility by ID

params.name: facilityId
params.description: Facility ID, in the form `<prefix>_<station>`, where prefix is one of "vha", "vba", "nca", or "vc", for health facility, benefits, cemetery, or vet center, respectively.

items.docs: Retrieve a specific facility by ID

info.name: Bulk download of all facility IDs

params.name: type
params.description: Optional facility type search filter

items.docs: Retrieves all available facility IDs only

info.name: Retrieve all VA health facilities reachable by driving within the specified time period

params.name: lat
params.description: Latitude of the location from which drive time will be calculated.

params.name: long
params.description: Longitude of the location from which drive time will be calculated.

params.name: drive_time
params.description: Filter to only include facilities that are within the specified number of drive time minutes from the requested location.

params.name: services[]
params.description: Optional facility service search filter

params.name: page
params.description: Page of results to return per paginated response.

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of results to return per paginated response.

items.docs:
Retrieve all VA health facilities that are located within a specified drive time from a specified location based on coordinates (`lat` and `long`). Optional filter parameters include `drive_time` and `services[]`. 

Results of this operation are paginated. Pagination can be modified by specifying `page` and/or `per_page` parameters. Responses include pagination information in the standard JSON API "links" and "meta" elements. 

The "attributes" element has information about the drive-time band t

info.name: Query a specific facility service using a service ID and a facility ID.

params.name: facilityId
params.description: Facility ID, in the form `<prefix>_<station>`, where prefix is one of "vha", "vba", "nca", or "vc", for health facility, benefits, cemetery, or vet center, respectively.

params.name: serviceId
params.description: Service ID, unique identifier for service

items.docs:
Query facility services using service parameter. Simply provide the service like `services/cardiology`. 

Results are paginated. JSON responses include pagination information in the standard JSON API "links" and "meta" elements. 

You may optionally specify `page` and `per_page` with any query.

info.name: Retrieve all services for a given facility

params.name: facilityId
params.description: Facility ID, in the form `<prefix>_<station>`, where prefix is one of "vha", "vba", "nca", or "vc", for health facility, benefits, cemetery, or vet center, respectively.

params.name: serviceIds
params.description: Comma separated list of `serviceIds` can be used alongside or independently of `serviceType`

params.name: serviceType
params.description: Type of service can be used alongside or independently of `serviceIds`

items.docs:
Queries for services associated with a facility. Supports optional search parameters to narrow the results. By default, all services for the given facility will be returned. A search may specify a comma separated list of service ids to include by using the `serviceIds` parameter. The type of services (e.g. "health", "benefits", etc) may be specified in the `type` parameter.


Results are paginated. JSON responses include pagination information in the standard JSON API "links" and "meta" elements
